'''wachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wearyingly|wearyingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wearyingly|wearyingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wachate|wachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wachatesher|wachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachatesherĂ«m|wachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wachatero|wachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wachateshĂ«|wachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachateshĂ«m|wachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwachatero|gokiwachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwachateshĂ«|gokiwachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachateshĂ«m|gokiwachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowachankerom|gowachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowachankeshĂ«|gowachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachankeshĂ«m|gowachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowachankeya|gowachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wachaterom|wachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachatemu|wachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wachateya|wachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwachaterom|gokiwachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachatemu|gokiwachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwachateya|gokiwachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wachachate|wachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wachachatesher|wachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachachatesherĂ«m|wachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wachachatero|wachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wachachateshĂ«|wachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachachateshĂ«m|wachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwachachatero|gokiwachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwachachateshĂ«|gokiwachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachachateshĂ«m|gokiwachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowachachankerom|gowachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowachachankeshĂ«|gowachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachachankeshĂ«m|gowachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowachachankeya|gowachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wachachaterom|wachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachachatemu|wachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wachachateya|wachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwachachaterom|gokiwachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachachatemu|gokiwachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwachachateya|gokiwachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠte|wĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠtesher|wĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠtero|wĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠchĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠterom|wĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠtemu|wĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠchĂŠteya|wĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠchĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠchĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafchafte|wafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafchaftesher|wafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafchaftesherĂ«m|wafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafchaftero|wafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafchafteshĂ«|wafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafchafteshĂ«m|wafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafchaftero|gokiwafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafchafteshĂ«|gokiwafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafchafteshĂ«m|gokiwafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafchafnkerom|gowafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafchafnkeshĂ«|gowafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafchafnkeshĂ«m|gowafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafchafnkeya|gowafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafchafterom|wafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafchaftemu|wafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafchafteya|wafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafchafterom|gokiwafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafchaftemu|gokiwafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafchafteya|gokiwafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
